last_item.body: Sarah Black and Dejan Kalinic make the case for the Tigers and Bombers on Friday night

last_item.headline: Female AFL creators say vile comments 'just one example of what we deal with'
last_item.body: A video circulated across social media of a group of men laughing about how one of them would "beat the f***" out of a group of female content creators.

last_item.headline: The battle for Tasmania's north has been won, but locals aren't convinced
last_item.body: They may not be scheduled to play their first AFL game until 2028, but the Tasmania Devils have claimed their first scalp — booting Hawthorn out of the state which has been its second home for more than two decades.

last_item.headline: Surge with handball or control by foot: AFL challengers make choices in 2026
last_item.body: An early review of the AFL season so far points to a split between two distinct styles, with one side making a case for being flag favourites by showing it can deliver both.

last_item.headline: Team smashed by more than 1,100 points in four games forfeits season
last_item.body: A country Victorian football team that was beaten by a collective 1,101 points in four matches forfeits the remainder of the senior season.

last_item.headline: Swans move annual Pride Game away from St Kilda after Collard case
last_item.body: The fallout continues from the Lance Collard AFL tribunal case, with St Kilda cut from the annual Pride Game against Sydney.

last_item.headline: May reveals 'mental breakdown' led to abrupt AFL retirement
last_item.body: Steven May opens up on his shock decision to retire from the AFL just two weeks before the season opener for Melbourne.

last_item.headline: Injury heartbreak as Roos favourite son, Blues goalsneak suffer season-ending blows
last_item.body: North Melbourne defender Jackson Archer has suffered a season-ending knee injury during the club’s return to pre-season training.The 23-year old, who is the son of club legend and Shinboner of the Century Glenn, ruptured his ACL while training over the weekend, continuing his horror run with injuries.“Archer injured his right knee during a session at Arden Street on Saturday, with scans confirming

last_item.headline: The unsigned guns who could be next year’s Callum Ah Chee in a new era of pre-season draft recruiting
last_item.body: A few weeks ago, Adelaide and Callum Ah Chee exploited the pre-season draft to engineer a de facto free agency move to facilitate his move from Brisbane, after a trade fell through.The ordinary way the PSD has been used for the last 20 years has been for teams to use it to pick up marginal players who fell out of their previous teams, or to move their own players around their lists.Ah Chee used it

last_item.headline: The man they call 'Magic': How Michael McLean blazed a trail for First Nations stars
